artifacts.title: SPIN — Visual Results
artifacts.summary: Visual summary of the SPIN paper: method and results.

artifacts.title: Object-Flow Machine Learning: Operation-Level Surrogate Modeling for Laboratory Workflows
artifacts.summary: 実験ワークフローの操作レベル代理モデリング：構造化されたプロトコルと終端観測から、ゼロショットのプロトコル間転移と閉ループ能動補正を学ぶ（AAAI 2027・日本語版）。

artifacts.title: Object-Flow Machine Learning: Operation-Level Surrogate Modeling for Laboratory Workflows
artifacts.summary: Operation-level surrogate modeling for laboratory workflows: zero-shot cross-protocol transfer and closed-loop active correction, learned from structured protocols and terminal observations (AAAI 2027).

artifacts.title: LiP-UCB: Cumulative Regret of Lipschitz Bandits with Lipschitz Propagation
artifacts.summary: Interactive companion to the LiP-UCB paper — Piyavskii–Shubert upper envelopes, Lipschitz-propagated confidence intervals, animated 1D & 2D demos, regret experiments, and the theory achieving the minimax cumulative-regret rate for noisy Lipschitz bandits.
